description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Android CI that runs on every push and pull request. Use an ubuntu-latest job to set up the build environment, check out the repository with submodules, and cache ccache and Gradle dependencies. Then, build the Android project with Gradle, upload the APK artifact, and extract symbols. Configure AWS credentials and upload the build to S3 if the repository matches and the event is a push. Finally, set up Sentry CLI and upload symbols to Sentry if the SENTRY_TOKEN secret is available.
